name: gateway-disconnect-reconnect
_note: The transport dropping and recovering. NOTE: real disconnect/reconnect is a WebSocket close handled by hermes-gateway.ts (onClose), not a classified gateway event. IF Hermes ever emits these as in-band frames they have no classifier branch today -> unsupported. gateway.ready (the post-reconnect handshake) DOES classify as lifecycle. Locked as honest current behavior; replay test asserts each frame is defined with a known kind and the bespoke types are unsupported with rawType set.
